name: Superheavy Samurai Soulbuster Gauntlet
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>留</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>る</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>バスター・ガントレット
desc: You can target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control; equip this monster from your hand or field to that target. It gains 400 DEF. During either player's Damage Step, when a Defense Position "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, and you have no Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; your battling monster's DEF becomes double its original DEF until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control; equip this monster from your hand or field to that target. It gains 400 DEF. During either player's Damage Step, when a Defense Position "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, and you have no Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; your battling monster's DEF becomes double its original DEF until the end of this turn.
eff: You can target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control; equip this monster from your hand or field to that target. It gains 400 DEF. During either player's Damage Step, when a Defense Position "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, and you have no Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; your battling monster's DEF becomes double its original DEF until the end of this turn.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires having no Spells in Graveyard
Requires having no Traps in Graveyard
